violations.text: Ice build up was observed in the walk in freezer refrigeration unit. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2026

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2026
